response.step_by_step_log: Analyzed the video from start to finish. The audio consists entirely of ambient Minecraft sound effects, game background music (instrumental), and the VTuber's narration/conversation. No vocal music was detected in the video.
response.global_summary: A video featuring continuous Minecraft gameplay with a VTuber interacting with the game environment and chat. No vocal music occurs.

scenes.description: Continuous Minecraft gameplay. The VTuber navigates the game world, interacts with objects, and talks to others.
